summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for KHOGA eCommerce. Wrote 39 pytest cases covering health, products, categories, auth (admin/customer), guest cart with X-Session-Id, admin RBAC (401/403/200), coupon CRUD + apply, product CRUD + inventory, full order flow (place→list→detail→admin status→cancel restores stock). After fixing one backend bug (coupon creation TypeError), all 39 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend smoke-tested via Playwright across home, collection (turkish-coffee), product page, search, add-to-cart, admin login + all 6 admin routes (dashboard/products/orders/coupons/users/inventory). Currency 'LE … EGP' verified.
action_items: Optional: implement guest→user cart merge on login (documented as MVP limitation). Currently when a guest adds items then logs in, items remain under session_id and the user cart starts empty; customer must add items AFTER login to complete checkout (matches the agent-to-agent note).
Consider raising HTTP 422→400 normalization for invalid payloads (CheckoutRequest returns 422 on bad shipping address — acceptable but inconsistent with the 'Cart is empty' 400).
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: routes/admin.py create_coupon was calling CouponDB(**data.dict(), code=data.code.upper()) which raised 'multiple values for keyword argument code' because data already has a code field. Refactored to mutate the dict first.
server.py exceeds 340 lines; consider extracting _seed_categories/_seed_products into utils/seeds.py for maintainability.
routes/cart.py _calc_totals: shipping_cost free-threshold (LE 500) is hardcoded — extract to env/config.
All Mongo _id removal is done correctly (.pop('_id', None)) across routes — verified via _no_leak_mongo_id recursive assertion in tests.
test_credentials: admin@khogaeg.com / Admin@123 (seeded). Customers created dynamically via POST /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Tests dynamically create TEST_ prefixed customer/product/coupon/order data; coupon and product are deleted in their respective tests. The placed order is left cancelled (stock restored) and remains in DB — minor noise but does not affect retests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_khoga_api.py is the canonical regression suite — runs in ~7s end-to-end against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Address schema requires field 'full_name' (NOT 'name'). Coupon code is auto-uppercased server-side. Guest cart uses X-Session-Id header; orders require auth + non-empty USER cart (guest cart NOT auto-merged on login — known MVP limitation). All admin endpoints return 401 without token, 403 for customer role, 200 for admin role.
rca of the issue: POST /api/admin/coupons returned 500 (TypeError: 'multiple values for keyword argument code'). RCA: in routes/admin.py:225, `CouponDB(**data.dict(), code=data.code.upper())` passed `code` both via the spread (CouponCreate already includes code) and as an explicit kwarg, causing Python to error. Fix: pop/override `code` in the dict before passing to CouponDB constructor. Repro: POST /api/admin/coupons with valid admin token and a new code → 500 before fix, 201 after fix. Test: TestAdminCoupons::test_create_coupon.
